animation.sf_nba.duck.walk.anim_time_update: q.anim_time + q.delta_time * v.anim_speed_multiplier * Math.min( 1, q.modified_move_speed / Math.max( 0.001, v.anim_speed_movement_max ) )

animation.sf_nba.duck.swim.anim_time_update: q.anim_time + q.delta_time * 1.5 * v.anim_speed_multiplier * Math.min( 1, q.modified_move_speed / Math.max( 0.001, v.anim_speed_movement_max ) )

animation.sf_nba.duck.run.anim_time_update: q.anim_time + q.delta_time * 2.0 * v.anim_speed_multiplier * Math.min( 1, q.modified_move_speed / Math.max( 0.001, v.anim_speed_movement_max ) )
